ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Strategic Investment and Acquisition Term Sheet between Daehan Mirae Materials Co., Ltd. (대한미래소재 주식회사, 사업자등록번호 123-45-67890, 서울특별시 가온구 미래로 123, 상상타워 18층, 07999) and Hanseong Venture Holdings Co. (한성벤처홀딩스 주식회사, 사업자등록번호 987-65-43210, 부산광역시 누리구 창업로 77, 한별센터 9층, 48777).

Transaction: Hanseong to acquire a 28% equity stake in Daehan via a mixed primary subscription and secondary purchase, with planned post-closing listing migration to the Hanguk Growth Exchange (HGE) Growth Board.

Regulatory and filings: Closing conditioned on clearance by the relevant financial supervisory bodies and issuer filings under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act (FSCMA), including pre-briefing of investor relations materials; no public DART-equivalent posting on the Hanguk Issuer Portal (HIP) prior to signing.

MNPI acknowledgment: Parties acknowledge possession of 미공개 중요정보, including Q3 margin guidance and preliminary KRX-migration timetable, and agree to maintain confidentiality and refrain from trading until public disclosure.

Employment and retention: Key employee retention grants to be implemented at closing; HR verification may require collection of limited personal data consistent with PIPA and payroll records maintained by Daehan.

Corporate governance: Post-closing board composition to include one Hanseong nominee and one independent director; interim compliance certifications to be executed by the Chief Compliance Officer (role only).
Placeholders: [담당자 성명], [부서], [ID No.________], and [계좌정보] are placeholders for closing packs and should not be construed as final personal or account data.
refrain from trading until public disclosure
post-closing listing migration to the Hanguk Growth Exchange (HGE) Growth Board
draft investor presentation circulated to qualified institutions only
no public DART-equivalent posting on the Hanguk Issuer Portal (HIP) prior to signing

Transaction: Hanseong to acquire a 28% equity stake in Daehan via a mixed primary subscription and secondary purchase, with planned post-closing listing migration to the Hanguk Growth Exchange (HGE) Growth Board.
Consideration: Total purchase price KRW 42,000,000,000, with KRW 30,000,000,000 primary proceeds to fund capex and KRW 12,000,000,000 secondary proceeds to selling shareholders, subject to price adjustment mechanisms.
Regulatory and filings: Closing conditioned on clearance by the relevant financial supervisory bodies and issuer filings under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act (FSCMA), including pre-briefing of investor relations materials; no public DART-equivalent posting on the Hanguk Issuer Portal (HIP) prior to signing.

Employment and retention: Key employee retention grants to be implemented at closing; HR verification may require collection of limited personal data consistent with PIPA and payroll records maintained by Daehan.

Issuer representative: Ms. Choi Eun-sun, CEO (Korean passport no. KP1234567), office line 02-5577-3311, address for notices identical to registered office.
Funding instructions: Subscription funds to be wired to escrow at Yeonhui Bank, account 110-9876-543210, SWIFT/BIC YEONKR22XXX, beneficiary Daehan Mirae Materials Co., Ltd.; remitter details to include investor company name and deal code “HGE28”.
Investor contact: Hanseong IR desk at ir@hanseong-ventures.example.com; generic IR helpline (public): 국번없이 1150 (non-issuer specific, may not route to deal team).
Corporate governance: Post-closing board composition to include one Hanseong nominee and one independent director; interim compliance certifications to be executed by the Chief Compliance Officer (role only).
Conditions precedent: Completion of limited financial, tax, and employment due diligence; confirmation of business registration numbers (사업자등록번호 123-45-67890 and 987-65-43210

Consideration: Total purchase price KRW 42,000,000,000, with KRW 30,000,000,000 primary proceeds to fund capex and KRW 12,000,000,000 secondary proceeds to selling shareholders, subject to price adjustment mechanisms.
Regulatory and filings: Closing conditioned on clearance by the relevant financial supervisory bodies and issuer filings under the Financial Investment Services and Capital Markets Act (FSCMA), including pre-briefing of investor relations materials; no public DART-equivalent posting on the Hanguk Issuer Portal (HIP) prior to signing.

Issuer representative: Ms. Choi Eun-sun, CEO (Korean passport no. KP1234567), office line 02-5577-3311, address for notices identical to registered office.
